variants.title: Dataset Open Question
variants.rewritten_question_text: For the solenoids shown in the diagram (which are assumed to be close to each other), the resistance of the left-hand circuit is slowly increased. In which direction does the ammeter needle (indicating the direction of conventional current) in the right-hand circuit deflect in response to this change?
variants.expected_answer: The needle deflects to the left.

rationale: Rewrote the multiple-choice relation into a direct open-ended question anchored on the correct option.

variants.title: Dataset Open Question
variants.rewritten_question_text: A battery, an ammeter, three resistors, and a switch are connected to form the simple circuit shown above. When the switch is closed, the potential difference across the 15 ohm resistor would equal the potential difference across which resistor?
variants.expected_answer: it would equal the potential difference across the 30 ohm resistor
